articles.title: Algorand Aims to Attract DeFi Builders With $300M Fund

The initiative seeks to bolster growth and enhance the ecosystem by supporting projects that leverage Algorand's blockchain technology. This funding is part of a broader strategy to position Algorand as a leading platform for DeFi applications.
